steps.name: HIGH/CRITICAL CVEs in Image
steps.statusMessage:
[HIGH] CVE-2023-52356 in tiff 4.7.1-r0 — A segment fault (SEGV) flaw was found in libtiff that could be triggered by passing a crafted tiff f
[HIGH] CVE-2025-70873 in sqlite-libs 3.49.2-r1 — An information disclosure issue in the zipfileInflate function in the zipfile extension in SQLite v3
[HIGH] CVE-2026-4775 in tiff 4.7.1-r0 — A flaw was found in the libtiff library. A remote attacker could exploit a signed integer overflow v
